DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SANTANDER CONSUMER USA INC. AS ASSIGNEE OF GEMB'S MOTION TO DEEM FACTS AS ADMITTED; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES OF $200.00 PLUS FILING FEE OF $40.00 - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM FACTS AS ADMITTED IS DENIED. PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2033.280(C), THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT JOE FAZIO HAS SERVED, BEFORE HEARING ON THE MOTION, RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION THAT ARE IN SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE WITH 2033.220. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2033.280(C), THE COURT IMPOSES A MONETARY SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 ON DEFENDANT JOE FAZIO, WHOSE FAILURE TO SERVE A TIMELY RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NECESSITATED THE INSTANT MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. PRO TEM JUDGE: REBECCA WOODSON; NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of And Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted; Memo Of P & A; Dec; Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $40.00 And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SANTANDER CONSUMER USA INC. AS ASSIGNEE OF GEMB's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted; Request For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $40.00 - Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Facts as Admitted is DENIED. Pursuant to C.C.P. 2033.280(c), the Court finds that defendant JOE FAZIO has served, before hearing on the motion, responses to Plaintiff's requests for admission that are in substantial compliance with 2033.220. Plaintiff's Request for Sanctions is GRANTED. Pursuant to C.C.P. 2033.280(c), the Court imposes a monetary sanction in the amount of $200.00 on defendant JOE FAZIO, whose failure to serve a timely response to plaintiff's requests for admission necessitated the instant motion. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson; Not reported
